data.content: Approved in implementation review. The only branch diff is a test-harness fix in crates/loom-cli/tests/update_integration.rs that resets accepted TcpStreams to blocking mode before reading requests, which directly addresses the previously rejected WouldBlock/connection reset failure in update_force_reinstalls_current_version. Validation passed with cargo test -p loom-cli --test update_integration and full cargo test (109 tests). No knot invariants were defined, and the change stays within test scope without altering product behavior.
